arts.ttl: Alexis Sanchez: Why did the Arsenal superstar flop so badly at Man Utd after blockbuster January swap-deal?
arts.sum: On January 25, 2019, Alexis Sanchez returned to Arsenal for the first time since joining Manchester United in a blockbuster swap deal involving Henrikh Mkhitaryan 12 months earlier. But this was Sanchez's night, not only because he'd masterminded his former club's downfall, but because it was the first time he really looked like a proper United player.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told harsh truth that speaks volumes about Man Utd situation
arts.sum: Nigel Winterburn has told Ruben Amorim that he need not worry about Arsenal swooping in for any of his star players in the January window, given the current state of affairs at Old Trafford
